name: axxx-institute
description: AXXX-Institute Claude Code skills marketplace. Ships two independently-installable plugins: paper-to-poster (AXXX-branded academic poster builder) and mlspace-jobs (MLSpace GPU job skills).

plugins.name: paper-to-poster
plugins.description: Turn a paper into an AXXX-branded, print-ready academic conference poster (single HTML/CSS → PDF), with affiliation logos fetched from this repo's asset releases. AGPL-3.0.

plugins.name: mlspace-jobs
plugins.description: MLSpace GPU job skills for the mls CLI: scaffold experiments-as-code training/eval launchers, first-time setup, and day-to-day operation. Bundles mlspace-jobs-scaffold, mlspace-jobs-quick-start, and mlspace-jobs. MIT.
